channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Ireland’s Micheal Martin and Trump in awkward St Patrick’s Day exchange
item.description: Ireland, which took strong stance on Gaza genocide, is similarly robust on Iran, but Martin is criticised for passivity.

item.title: Pakistan denies hospital strike in Afghanistan as death toll hits 400
item.description: Pakistani minister 'strongly rejects' Afghan government's accusation, saying his country only targets military sites.

item.title: Trump says US does not ‘need’ Strait of Hormuz help, despite appeal
item.description: US president strikes defiant tone as allies reject joining coalition, does not name countries he says 'on their way'.

item.title: Who was Ali Larijani, Iran’s powerful insider?
item.description: Iran has confirmed that security chief Ali Larijani has been killed.

item.title: FIFA rejects Iran’s request to move World Cup matches from US to Mexico
item.description: The 2026 World Cup matches will be played as per schedule announced last year, the football organisation says.

item.title: Could the Iran war keep Netanyahu in power for longer?
item.description: Huge support in Israel for joint US bombing campaign in Iran.

item.title: Iraq’s capital Baghdad rocked by powerful blasts near US embassy
item.description: The attacks are part of an escalating cycle of violence between US forces and Iraqi groups aligned with Tehran.

item.title: Trump says it’s a ‘good thing’ counterterrorism director resigned over Iran
item.description: US President Trump reacted to the resignation of the US National Counterterrorism Centre’s director, Joe Kent.

item.title: US confirms 157 killed in maritime strikes experts call ‘extrajudicial’
item.description: Defence official tells Congress that 47 alleged drug-trafficking vessels have been struck since campaign began.

item.title: Starmer, Zelenskyy urge ‘focus’ on Ukraine as Iran war diverts attention
item.description: As leaders of Ukraine and UK meet, Turkiye's top diplomat reiterates his country's offer to host Russia-Ukraine talks.
